title: KOSMOS UI L2 Slash Command Catalog
description: Canonical schema for tui/src/commands/catalog.ts. Single source of truth for autocomplete dropdown (FR-014) and /help 4-group output (FR-029). Spec 1635-ui-l2-citizen-port.

name.description: Slash command including any positional sub-command (e.g., '/consent list').

group.description: Help-screen group per FR-029. Each command belongs to exactly one group.

arg_signature.description: Free-form argument signature shown in autocomplete dropdown, e.g., 'rcpt-<id>' or '--date FROM..TO'.

hidden.description: When true, excluded from /help and autocomplete. Reserved for development-only commands.

examples.name: /consent revoke
examples.description_en: Revoke a previously granted permission receipt
